_comment: Per-route gzip JS budgets in KB, per the migration plan (floofy-honking-storm.md). Matched by filename substring against dist/assets/*.js. 'client'/'app' are vite-react-ssg's current chunk names for the shared runtime + all routes bundled together (no route-level code-splitting yet, added starting Phase 2) — once routes are React.lazy-split, replace these with the actual per-route chunk names.
